THE MAP - How MEV Swarm Actually Works

API Keys for MEV Swarm

This file stores API keys for the MEV Swarm system.

## Location

All keys should be stored in: mev-swarm/.env

## Required Keys

| Key | Description | Where to Get |
|-----|-------------|--------------|
| PRIVATEKEY | Wallet private key (64 hex chars, no 0x) | Your wallet export |
| ETHRPCURL | Ethereum mainnet RPC | Alchemy or Infura |
| ETHERSCANAPIKEY | For contract verification | Etherscan.io |
| FLASHBOTSRPCURL | Flashbots bundle RPC | rpc.flashbots.net |

## Example .env format


PRIVATEKEY=your64charhexkeyhere
ETHRPCURL=https://eth-mainnet.g.alchemy.com/v2/YOURKEY
ETHERSCANAPIKEY=youretherscankey
FLASHBOTSRPCURL=https://rpc.flashbots.net/fast?originId=yourid


## Security

- Never commit .env to git
- Keep this file private
- Keys are loaded via dotenv in Node.js
